context: GeoLiftMarketSelection on realistic panel, N=3, sequential, time vs ns

model.interpretation: Only ~28% of the ns=1000 runtime scales with ns; the other ~72% is fixed per-sim work (outer fit, counterfactual, validation, wrangling). So the ns lever alone cannot exceed ~1.4x no matter how low ns goes. Bigger wins require cutting the FIXED work: fit-reuse across effect sizes and parallelism.
